summary: Phase 2 Block C end-to-end testing complete. Backend: 16/16 pytest pass (Block B regression + new admin teaching CRUD + KB lookup + KB-augmented text-to-sign). Frontend: header reorg, Más dropdown, /traductor alias redirect, /ensenanzas auth gate, all 4 admin tabs, and 6 existing pages all working. Two reported 'failures' were test-script artifacts, not real bugs.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py is now ~1630 lines and is approaching split-worthy. Consider moving teaching/* and billing/* endpoints into separate routers (server.py, billing.py, admin_teaching.py) for maintainability. Not blocking.

Admin gate uses a single shared password sent in X-Admin-Password header for every admin call. For production, consider issuing a short-lived signed token after /api/admin/login instead of forwarding the password on every request. Not a regression.

/api/admin/teaching/process kicks off background work via asyncio.create_task without a job queue. If the process is killed mid-extraction, the file stays in 'processing' forever. Consider a stale-job sweeper or a real worker. Not blocking for MVP.
Layout.jsx admin link uses testId='nav-teaching' but review_request lists it as 'nav-ensenanzas'. Either is fine; just align spec ↔ code so future test agents don't get mismatched testids.

_kb_lookup uses regex with f-string interpolation of user input (word_l). If a future endpoint allows arbitrary q from the public, sanitize regex special chars (re.escape) to avoid ReDoS / wrong matches. Currently low risk because callers come from /kb/lookup with short query strings.

success_rate.frontend: 100% effective (45/45 real checks; 2 'fails' were script artifacts; 1 'err' was a pytest-style typo on is_visible await — page actually redirected as expected)

test_credentials: Admin: signlanguage-admin-2026 (read from /app/memory/test_credentials.md and confirmed against /app/backend/.env)
seed_data_creation: Test created and cleaned up: 1 teaching file (TEST_kb.docx) + 1 correction (TESTHOLA/LSE) + their derived KB rows. All purged via DELETE endpoints in test teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression test file is /app/backend/tests/test_iter8_block_c.py — covers Block B (/health, /email/status, /rtc/room, /offline/pack) AND Block C (admin teaching CRUD, corrections, KB-augmented text-to-sign, public /api/kb/lookup, admin auth gating with 401 on missing/wrong password). Run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL set + `pytest backend/tests/test_iter8_block_c.py -v`. Frontend: admin-link testid is 'nav-teaching' NOT 'nav-ensenanzas'. teach-file-input is a hidden <input type='file'>; check existence not visibility (use page.locator(...).count() > 0 or click via teach-pick-file). The shared admin auth context persists in localStorage key 'signlang.admin.password.v1'.

rca_of_script_only_artifacts.fail_1_teach_file_input: Hidden file input — Ensenanzas.jsx line 373 has data-testid='teach-file-input' on a display:none input. is_visible() returns False but element exists. Real UX uses teach-pick-file button which is visible. NOT a bug.
rca_of_script_only_artifacts.fail_2_nav_ensenanzas: Admin link testid is 'nav-teaching', not 'nav-ensenanzas'. Admin badge appeared in nav after admin login (confirming isAdmin=true via shared AdminAuthContext + localStorage). Spec naming mismatch only.
rca_of_script_only_artifacts.err_1_traductor_redirect: page.is_visible returns bool not coroutine in this context — script bug. Logged URL confirms /traductor → /texto-a-signos worked correctly.

verified_flows: Backend /api/health returns 200 with llm_key_configured=true
Backend admin gate: 401 on missing X-Admin-Password (4 endpoints + upload)
Backend admin gate: 401 on wrong X-Admin-Password
Backend POST /api/admin/teaching/upload accepts DOCX (and other types via detect_type)
Backend GET /api/admin/teaching/files lists uploaded files
Backend POST /api/admin/teaching/process/{id} returns {started:true}; status flips processed/error within ~45s
Backend GET /api/admin/teaching/stats returns full shape {files, processed, pending, errors, kb_count, corrections, by_language[]}
Backend POST /api/admin/teaching/corrections upserts; GET lists; DELETE removes
Backend GET /api/kb/lookup?q=... is public, returns correction with _source='correction'
Backend POST /api/translate/text-to-sign returns kb_used>=1 when correction exists for word in text; includes confidence + low_confidence_warning fields in response model
Frontend desktop nav shows all 9 primary testids + brand-link
Frontend nav-more dropdown reveals quiz, fingerspelling, community, dictionary, history
Frontend /traductor → /texto-a-signos redirect works
Frontend /texto-a-signos shows the H1 'Traductor de texto a signos'
Frontend /ensenanzas auth gate: wrong password keeps user on login (backend returned 401)
Frontend /ensenanzas correct password unlocks: tab-upload, tab-kb, tab-corrections, tab-train + teach-stats card
Frontend kb tab: kb-search, kb-lang and kb-grid all present (grid populated by prior test data)
Frontend corrections tab: all 9 form testids present (cor-word/lang/hands/mouth/expression/body/status/notes/save)
Frontend train tab: train-reprocess-pending button present
Frontend Admin badge appears in nav after admin login (shared AdminAuthContext + localStorage works)
Frontend existing routes still load: /, /traducir-en-vivo, /diccionario, /llamada, /avatar, /precios
